name: karp-bible-code
description: AI-assisted ELS (Equidistant Letter Spacing) Bible code research engine with statistical significance testing. Search for hidden letter patterns in the Bible's continuous text, cross-reference terms for proximity and clustering, run Monte Carlo simulations, and visualise results in an interactive matrix grid. Complete KJV Bible pre-loaded (31,102 verses). Built on KARP Word Graph — includes full scripture study tools, knowledge graph, and semantic search. Web UI at localhost:3458.

ui_port.title: Web UI Port
ui_port.description: Port for the local web UI (default: 3458). Open localhost:3458 in your browser for the ELS Matrix visualiser.

ui_password.title: Web UI Password
ui_password.description: Protects the web UI with a passphrase. If left blank, you'll be prompted on first visit.

tools.name: els_search
tools.description: Search for a term encoded at equidistant letter spacing (ELS) in the Bible's continuous letter stream.

tools.name: els_session
tools.description: Create, view, or list ELS research sessions to group related searches.

tools.name: els_history
tools.description: Browse past ELS searches with filters — terms, streams, sessions.

tools.name: els_streams
tools.description: List available letter streams with statistics and letter frequency analysis.

tools.name: els_research_stats
tools.description: Aggregate statistics for the Bible code research system.

tools.name: els_proximity
tools.description: Cross-reference two terms to find shared letter positions and closest approaches.

tools.name: els_cluster
tools.description: Find dense regions where multiple search terms converge in the letter stream.

tools.name: els_sweep
tools.description: Scan entire research history for unexpected connections between terms searched at different times.

tools.name: els_stats
tools.description: Statistical significance testing — expected frequency, Poisson p-value, and Monte Carlo simulation.

tools.name: read_scripture
tools.description: Read specific scripture verses. Accepts references like 'John 3:16', 'Genesis 1:1-5', or 'Psalm 23'.

tools.name: search_scripture
tools.description: Semantic search across all scripture by meaning — e.g. 'hope in suffering', 'messianic prophecy'.

tools.name: study_passage
tools.description: Deep study mode — verse text, surrounding context, and your study notes on a passage.

tools.name: remember
tools.description: Store study notes, prayers, insights, cross-references, or memory verses in the knowledge graph.

tools.name: recall
tools.description: Semantic search across your personal study notes and knowledge graph.

tools.name: connect
tools.description: Create a named relationship between two nodes in the knowledge graph.

tools.name: kg_status
tools.description: Knowledge graph and ELS engine health check.

tools.name: snapshot
tools.description: Create a backup snapshot of the entire database.
